title: The Anatomy of Love
writer: Giorgio Bassani, Alessandro Blasetti, Achille Campanile
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Dany Robin, François Périer
plot: A five-part compilation film. In "The Baby," a poverty-ridden couple with children decides that their newborn is too much and decide to leave him in a church, but the mother can't go through with it and decides to leave him in an ...
